nasb.text: Then the chiefs of Edom were dismayed; The leaders of Moab, trembling grips them; All the inhabitants of Canaan have melted away.

esv.text: Now are the chiefs of Edom dismayed; trembling seizes the leaders of Moab; all the inhabitants of Canaan have melted away.

cnv.text: 那時，以東的族長驚惶，摩押的英雄被戰兢抓住，所有迦南的居民都膽戰心寒。

ccb.text: 以东的族长惶恐， 摩押的英雄颤栗， 迦南的居民都胆战心惊。
